name: Ravioli Soup
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb ground beef or Italian sausage
1 package cheese ravioli or tortellini; fresh or frozen
1 can (28 oz) Del Monte fresh-cut Diced Tomatoes with Basil, Garlic & Oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart pot, cook the meat until browned and crumbled.
2. Drain excess fat from the pot if necessary.
3. Add tomatoes, beef broth, and 1 3/4 cups water to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Reduce heat to low and stir in ravioli or tortellini according to package directions.
6. Add green beans and sliced green onions.
7. Heat through until all ingredients are hot and cooked through.
8. Season with pepper to taste.
9. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese on top, if desired.
